sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, current_localtimestamp());
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = current_localtimestamp() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, current_localtimestamp() AS current_time FROM test_timestamps;
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < current_localtimestamp() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
